_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: p38 protein levels were negatively correlated with methylation at this site (ρ = − 0.56, p = 0.038)... leading to variable but overall decreased p38 protein expression (T180/T182) in PNFs
details: Successfully detected p38 protein levels with negative correlation (ρ = -0.56, p = 0.038) to methylation at MAPK14 promoter region, showing higher expression in CNFs than PNFs
